title: Single Nucleus RNAseq Sample Prep from Nodose Ganglia
author: Sebastian Preissl
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.v72e9qe

steps.title: Nodose ganglia are dissected and flash frozen in liquid nitrogen
steps.instruction: Nodose ganglia are dissected and flash frozen in liquid nitrogen.Store at -80C until ready to isolate nuclei.Grind up the sample with liquid nitrogen using the 1.5mL centrifuge tube and fitting pestle.

steps.title: Add 500 ul Lysis Buffer to...
steps.instruction: Add 500 ul Lysis Buffer to pulverized tissue, pipette 10x up and down and place on ice Incubate 5 min with the overhead shaker in the cold room

steps.title: Spin down 5 min 500g at 4C using soft settings
steps.instruction: Spin down 5 min 500g at 4C using soft settings. Remove supernatant

steps.title: Resuspend tissue in 400 ul Sorting...
steps.instruction: Resuspend tissue in 400 ul Sorting Buffer by pipetting 10x up and down.

steps.title: Filter with a green 30 um...
steps.instruction: Filter with a green 30 um CellTRic (Sysmex) into FACS tube. Wash filter with another 200 ul SB. Gently clap rack against bench to fully transfer the nuclei suspension. Add 6 ul DRAQ7 (Cell signaling) to stain nuclei and place sample on ice.

steps.title: For collection of sorted nuclei add...
steps.instruction: For collection of sorted nuclei add 50 ul Collection Buffer to a 1.5 ml LoBind tube (collection tube).

steps.title: Use 100 um Chip for sorting...
steps.instruction: Use 100 um Chip for sorting of nuclei Set temperature for sample and collection to 5C Identify single nuclei based FSC/SSC signals andDRAQ7 fluorescence in FL-6 (PE-Cy7) channel

steps.title: Sort 60,000 (200 ul) nuclei (Gate
steps.instruction: Sort 60,000 (200 ul) nuclei (Gate: “Sorting”) with the setting “Purity” into the prepared collection tube. After sorting is finished (10-20 min), mix sample and keep on ice.

steps.title: Spin down 15 min 1000xg at...
steps.instruction: Spin down 15 min 1000xg at 4C (Using swinging bucket rotor). After centrifugation, there should be a tiny blue pellet be visible. Remove supernatant and resuspend in 18 ul RB by pipetting 10x (Recovery of nuclei should be around 50-60%). Leave sample on ice.

steps.title: Check for single cell suspension and count nuclei using hemocytometer
steps.instruction: Check for single cell suspension and count nuclei using hemocytometer. Mix 5 ul sample + 5 ul Trypan blue and count 4 big squares. Calculation: (counted number)/4*20=nuclei/ul). Adjust concentration to 1000 nuclei/ul. Follow 10xGenomics library prep protocol.
